title: tephrosia anomala
intro: Tephrosia anomala is a plant species commonly known as the 'Wild Marrow' or 'Fried Egg Plant' due to its unique, egg-shaped pods. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Tephrosia anomala include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and prevent the growth of microorganisms. Tephrosia anomala can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine practices.
